message:
feat(demo_showcase, traceback): enhance e2e tests and traceback rendering

Demo Showcase Improvements:
- demo_showcase.rs: Add new scene handling and CLI improvements
- demo_showcase_e2e.rs: Extend E2E test coverage

Traceback Rendering:
- traceback.rs: Improve stack trace rendering with better formatting

Cargo.toml: Dependency updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -2,6 +2,15 @@
 # It is not intended for manual editing.
 version = 4
 
+[[package]]
+name = "addr2line"
+version = "0.25.1"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "1b5d307320b3181d6d7954e663bd7c774a838b8220fe0593c86d9fb09f498b4b"
+dependencies = [
+ "gimli",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "adler2"
 version = "2.0.1"
@@ -94,6 +103,21 @@ version = "1.5.0"
 source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
 checksum = "c08606f8c3cbf4ce6ec8e28fb0014a2c086708fe954eaa885384a6165172e7e8"
 
+[[package]]
+name = "backtrace"
+version = "0.3.76"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "bb531853791a215d7c62a30daf0dde835f381ab5de4589cfe7c649d2cbe92bd6"
+dependencies = [
+ "addr2line",
+ "cfg-if",
+ "libc",
+ "miniz_oxide",
+ "object",
+ "rustc-demangle",
+ "windows-link",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "base64"
 version = "0.22.1"
@@ -493,6 +517,12 @@ dependencies = [
  "wasip2",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "gimli"
+version = "0.32.3"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "e629b9b98ef3dd8afe6ca2bd0f89306cec16d43d907889945bc5d6687f2f13c7"
+
 [[package]]
 name = "globset"
 version = "0.4.16"
@@ -738,6 +768,15 @@ dependencies = [
  "libc",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "object"
+version = "0.37.3"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "ff76201f031d8863c38aa7f905eca4f53abbfa15f609db4277d44cd8938f33fe"
+dependencies = [
+ "memchr",
+]
+
 [[package]]
 name = "once_cell"
 version = "1.21.3"
@@ -1056,6 +1095,7 @@ checksum = "7a2d987857b319362043e95f5353c0535c1f58eec5336fdfcf626430af7def58"
 name = "rich_rust"
 version = "0.1.1"
 dependencies = [
+ "backtrace",
  "bitflags",
  "criterion",
  "crossterm",
@@ -1077,6 +1117,12 @@ dependencies = [
  "unicode-width",
 ]
 
+[[package]]
+name = "rustc-demangle"
+version = "0.1.27"
+source = "registry+https://github.com/rust-lang/crates.io-index"
+checksum = "b50b8869d9fc858ce7266cce0194bd74df58b9d0e3f6df3a9fc8eb470d95c09d"
+
 [[package]]
 name = "rustc_version"
 version = "0.4.1"

@@ -53,6 +53,9 @@ pulldown-cmark = { version = "0.13", optional = true }
 # JSON rendering (Phase 4)
 serde_json = { version = "1.0", optional = true }
 
+# Backtrace capture for automatic traceback rendering
+backtrace = { version = "0.3", optional = true }
+
 [dev-dependencies]
 criterion = "0.8"
 serde_json = "1.0"
@@ -76,7 +79,8 @@ syntax = ["syntect"]
 markdown = ["pulldown-cmark"]
 json = ["serde_json"]
 tracing = ["dep:tracing", "dep:tracing-subscriber"]
-full = ["syntax", "markdown", "json"]
+backtrace = ["dep:backtrace"]
+full = ["syntax", "markdown", "json", "backtrace"]
 showcase = ["full", "tracing"]
 
 [profile.release]
